title: Vapor and Mist

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: In silence I wrestle with words unsaid
While flames of frustration burn in my head
I set a guard before my tongue
But still these thoughts won't leave me, they've just begun

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Show me my days like shadows that fade
Help me to see how brief we're made
All our pride like morning frost
In the heat of day, so quickly lost

sections.label: Chorus
lines: (I cry out)
My hope is in You alone
This fragile breath, these bones
A whisper in the infinite
A pilgrim passing through
My hope is in You

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Every treasure we chase is vapor and mist
Our anxious hearts chase what won't persist
Like phantoms dancing in the night
We build our kingdoms out of candlelight

sections.label: Bridge
lines: Hear my prayer, hear my cry
Don't turn away as tears fall from my eyes
I'm just a stranger here below
Like all my fathers were before

sections.label: Final Chorus
lines: My hope is in You alone
This fragile breath, these bones
A whisper in the infinite
A pilgrim passing through
My hope is in You
(My hope is in You)

epigraph: while the wicked is before me
